title: TBOX -> MT
content:
The decision has been made .. I'm porting my TBOX to  "MovableType":http://www.movabletype.org  (with  "Smarty":http://smarty.php.net  as the rendering engine). Will be away for awhile.

Hopefully, a nested (threaded) comment solution will come a long soon. Actually, there's one right now but it needs to be patched into MT. I think I'll wait.

Now you know why my site is never at the "nearly done" state. :)
